name: BitSight Security Ratings
description: Security ratings platform providing objective, data-driven measurements of organizational cybersecurity performance with continuous monitoring and third-party risk assessment

actions.name: Get Company Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a company including current rating, grade, and industry

parameters.name: company_guid
parameters.description: The GUID identifier of the company

actions.name: List Portfolio Companies
actions.description: Retrieve all companies in the monitored portfolio with their current ratings

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Company Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings (events and records) for a specific company with severity counts

parameters.name: company_guid
parameters.description: The GUID identifier of the company

parameters.name: risk_vector
parameters.description: Filter by risk vector (e.g., patching_cadence, open_ports, botnet_infections)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Rating History
actions.description: Retrieve the historical security rating trend for a company

parameters.name: company_guid
parameters.description: The GUID identifier of the company

actions.name: Get Company Assets
actions.description: Retrieve a company's observed internet assets including domains, IP ranges, and finding counts

parameters.name: company_guid
parameters.description: The GUID identifier of the company

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Risk Vectors
actions.description: Retrieve risk vector grades and scores for a company across all security categories

parameters.name: company_guid
parameters.description: The GUID identifier of the company

actions.name: Get Industry Rating
actions.description: Retrieve the security rating history for a specific industry for benchmarking

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts for rating changes and security events in the portfolio

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination
